titleStmt.title: SII 24.331: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 331. (A.R. No. 14 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of some lands in Śēndaṉpāḷaṉ-Kaṇṇaṉkuḍi as bhaṭṭavṛitti by Aṇṇa-Śauṇḍappagaḷ to Uttama Nambi, son of Uttama Nambi of Kāśyapagōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra at the instance of Chikka-Uḍaiyar, the brother of Gajavēṭṭai Pratāpa-Dēvarāya for supervising the conduct of the car festival instituted in the name of Ādityadēva Uḍaiyar, the father of the donor, referred to in No. 329 above. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1357, Rākshasa, Makara, śu. 11, Saturday, Rōhiṇi, regularly correspond to A.D. 1435, December 31, Saturday; ·43. The nakshatra Rōhiṇī commenced at ·99 of the previous day and was current throughout the day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalīśvaran śrīvīragajaveṭṭai pratāpadevarāya mahārāyar pṛthivīrājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 5 10 7- l mel cellaniṉṟa rākṣasa samvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Ekādaśi- yum śanivāramum rohiṇiyum śubhrayogamum peṟṟa ttu nāḷ śrīraṅganātha śrībhaṇḍārattukku kaṭava Uttamanampikku Ādityadeva kaṉār Aṇṇa cavuṇṭappakaḷ kuṭutta dharmmaśāsanap paṭṭayam gajaveṭṭai pratāpadevarāyamahārāyar
tampiyār cikkauṭaiyār perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devaṟku vaṭakarai Āmurnāṭu centaṉpāḷaṉ kaṇṇankuṭi kuṭukkaccollit tiruvuḷḷampaṟṟi varakkāṭṭi Aruḷiṉa rāyasappaṭikku vasiṣṭhagotrattu Āślāyanasūtrattu Ādityadeva Uṭaiyar perāle naṭakkiṟa tiruttert tirunāḷaikku Inta centaṉpāḷaṉ ka nkuṭi kuṭutta Aḷavukku Inta Ūrile cikka Uṭaiyār Irāya paṭikku kāśyapagotrattu ṛgvedattu Āśvalāyana sūtrattu Uttamanampi makaṉ Uttamanampikku paṭṭavṛtti
sarvamānnya Iṟaiyiliyāka candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakkuṭutta Irāyavipāṭaṉ naṉcey rūpāy 3 li Inta nilam muveliyum niṅkalāka niṉṟa nāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nattampaṭukai māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai maṟṟum Uṇṭu Āṉa sakalasvarṇādāyamum sakalabhattādāyamum Uṭpaṭa candrādityavaraiyum sarvamān_yam Āka Aṉubhavittukkoṇṭu Intat tirutter tirunāḷ tāḻvu Aṟa naṭattavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
